title: 案例复盘：Cloudflare 案例线索
original_title: Sandbox SDK - Deprecating Sandbox SDK features
summary: Today we are announcing the deprecation of several features from the Sandbox SDK. The SDK has grown and matured substantially since it first launched. As agent workflows have developed, we have shipped many new features and experiments so developers can easily integrate secure, isolated code execution into their workflows. We want the SDK to continue providing a stable foundation for agentic workflows while we iterate quickly on the codebase. These deprecated features have either been superseded by newer capabilities or seen low adoption. They will remain in the codebase until July 9, 2026, after which they will no longer be present in future Sandbox SDK versions. HTTP and WebSocket transports In April 2026, we released the new RPC transport and deprecated the WebSocket transport. This setting governs how the sandbox container talks to the Workers ecosystem. selection_dossier.core_question: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 废弃部分功能（HTTP/WebSocket 传输、低采用率特性）对普通技术人/独立开发者的实际影响是什么？是否有可替代方案或迁移成本？
selection_dossier.why_this_topic_matters: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 是 AI 代码沙箱领域的重要产品，其功能废弃可能影响已采用该 SDK 的开发者工作流，同时反映 Cloudflare 在 Agent 基础设施上的战略方向。但当前影响范围尚不明确，需要更多数据支撑。
fact_summary: Cloudflare 宣布废弃 Sandbox SDK 中的 HTTP 和 WebSocket 传输模式，以及一些低采用率特性。
废弃功能将在 2026 年 7 月 9 日之后从未来版本中移除。
官方推荐迁移至新的 RPC 传输模式。
废弃原因：已被新能力取代或采用率低。
Sandbox SDK 用于在 Workers 生态中安全执行隔离代码，支持 Agent 工作流。

audience_fit.why_interested: 核心技术人关注 SDK 变更对现有项目的影响和迁移成本；入门读者可了解沙箱技术选型；商业读者关注 Cloudflare 产品策略。
audience_fit.reader_risk: 缺乏实际案例和社区反馈，容易写成纯官方公告解读，读者参与度低。

research_evidence.fetched_text: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK | Hacker News Hacker News new | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login Cloudflare Sandbox SDK ( cloudflare.com ) 256 points by bentaber 7 months ago | hide | past | favorite | 90 comments simonw 7 months ago | next [–] Looks like there's one feature missing from this that I care about: I'd like more finely grained control over what outbound internet connections code running on the box can make. As far as I can tell it's all or nothing right now: this.ctx.container.start({ enableInternet: false, }); I want to run untrusted code (from users or LLMs) in these containers, and I'd like to avoid someone malicious using my container to launch attacks against other sites from them. As such, I'd like to be able to allow-list just specific network points. Maybe I'm OK with the container talking to an API I provide but not to the world at wide. Or perhaps I'm OK with it fetching data from npm and PyPI but I don't want it to be able to access anything else (a common pattern these days, e.g. Claude's Code Interpreter does this.) masterj 7 months ago | parent | next [–] Cloudflare has Outbound Workers for exactly this use-case: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-for-platforms/w... If these aren't enabled for containers / sandboxes yet, I bet they will be soon kentonv 7 months ago | parent | prev | next [–] You may be interested in the Dynamic Worker Loader API, which lets you set up isolate-based sandboxes (instead of containers) and gives you extremely fine-grained, object-capability-based control over permissions. material_pack.core_question: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 废弃部分功能（HTTP/WebSocket 传输、低采用率特性）对普通技术人/独立开发者的实际影响是什么？是否有可替代方案或迁移成本？
material_pack.why_this_topic_matters: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 是 AI 代码沙箱领域的重要产品，其功能废弃可能影响已采用该 SDK 的开发者工作流，同时反映 Cloudflare 在 Agent 基础设施上的战略方向。但当前影响范围尚不明确，需要更多数据支撑。
fact_summary: Cloudflare 宣布废弃 Sandbox SDK 中的 HTTP 和 WebSocket 传输模式，以及一些低采用率特性。
废弃功能将在 2026 年 7 月 9 日之后从未来版本中移除。
官方推荐迁移至新的 RPC 传输模式。
废弃原因：已被新能力取代或采用率低。
Sandbox SDK 用于在 Workers 生态中安全执行隔离代码，支持 Agent 工作流。

audience_fit.why_interested: 核心技术人关注 SDK 变更对现有项目的影响和迁移成本；入门读者可了解沙箱技术选型；商业读者关注 Cloudflare 产品策略。
audience_fit.reader_risk: 缺乏实际案例和社区反馈，容易写成纯官方公告解读，读者参与度低。

mass_interest_hook.why_non_technical_people_may_click: 标题可突出“你的代码可能突然不能用了”的危机感，但实际影响面窄，难以吸引泛兴趣读者。
mass_interest_hook.story_seed: 一个独立开发者依赖 Sandbox SDK 构建的 AI 工具，突然收到废弃通知，不得不紧急迁移。
mass_interest_hook.do_not_overhype: 不要夸大影响范围，目前缺乏证据表明大量用户受影响。

topic_tension.conflict_point: Cloudflare 推动 RPC 替代 HTTP/WebSocket，但开发者可能面临迁移成本和兼容性问题。
topic_tension.debate_question: RPC 传输是否真的优于 HTTP/WebSocket？迁移是否值得？
stakeholders: 替代方案提供商（如 Northflank）
topic_tension.why_people_would_comment: 讨论迁移经验、吐槽官方决策、对比替代方案。
topic_tension.traffic_risk: 话题过于专业，缺乏广泛争议点，容易变成小圈子讨论。

timeline: 2025-08-05: Sandbox SDK 重大更新（添加流式、代码解释器等）
2026-04: 发布 RPC 传输，废弃 WebSocket 传输
2026-07-09: 废弃功能从 SDK 中移除

As far as I can tell it's all or nothing right now: this.ctx.container.start({ enableInternet: false, }); I want to run untrusted code (from users or LLMs) in these containers, and I'd like to avoid someone malicious using my container to launch attacks against other sites from them. As such, I'd like to be able to allow-list just specific network points. Maybe I'm OK with the container talking to an API I provide but not to the world at wide. Or perhaps I'm OK with it fetching data from npm and PyPI but I don't want it to be able to access anything else (a common pattern these days, e.g. Claude's Code Interpreter does this.) masterj 7 months ago | parent | next [–] Cloudflare has Outbound Workers for exactly this use-case: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-for-platforms/w... for_gpt_editor.brief: Today we are announcing the deprecation of several features from the Sandbox SDK. The SDK has grown and matured substantially since it first launched. As agent workflows have developed, we have shipped many new features and experiments so developers can easily integrate secure, isolated code execution into their workflows. We want the SDK to continue providing a stable foundation for agentic workflows while we iterate quickly on the codebase. These deprecated features have either been superseded by newer capabilities or seen low adoption. They will remain in the codebase until July 9, 2026, after which they will no longer be present in future Sandbox SDK versions. HTTP and WebSocket transports In April 2026, we released the new RPC transport and deprecated the WebSocket transport. This setting governs how the sandbox container talks to the Workers ecosystem. selection_dossier.core_question: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 废弃部分功能（HTTP/WebSocket 传输、低采用率特性）对普通技术人/独立开发者的实际影响是什么？是否有可替代方案或迁移成本？
selection_dossier.why_this_topic_matters: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 是 AI 代码沙箱领域的重要产品，其功能废弃可能影响已采用该 SDK 的开发者工作流，同时反映 Cloudflare 在 Agent 基础设施上的战略方向。但当前影响范围尚不明确，需要更多数据支撑。
fact_summary: Cloudflare 宣布废弃 Sandbox SDK 中的 HTTP 和 WebSocket 传输模式，以及一些低采用率特性。
废弃功能将在 2026 年 7 月 9 日之后从未来版本中移除。
官方推荐迁移至新的 RPC 传输模式。
废弃原因：已被新能力取代或采用率低。
Sandbox SDK 用于在 Workers 生态中安全执行隔离代码，支持 Agent 工作流。

audience_fit.why_interested: 核心技术人关注 SDK 变更对现有项目的影响和迁移成本；入门读者可了解沙箱技术选型；商业读者关注 Cloudflare 产品策略。
audience_fit.reader_risk: 缺乏实际案例和社区反馈，容易写成纯官方公告解读，读者参与度低。

research_evidence.fetched_text: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK | Hacker News Hacker News new | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login Cloudflare Sandbox SDK ( cloudflare.com ) 256 points by bentaber 7 months ago | hide | past | favorite | 90 comments simonw 7 months ago | next [–] Looks like there's one feature missing from this that I care about: I'd like more finely grained control over what outbound internet connections code running on the box can make. As far as I can tell it's all or nothing right now: this.ctx.container.start({ enableInternet: false, }); I want to run untrusted code (from users or LLMs) in these containers, and I'd like to avoid someone malicious using my container to launch attacks against other sites from them. As such, I'd like to be able to allow-list just specific network points. Maybe I'm OK with the container talking to an API I provide but not to the world at wide. Or perhaps I'm OK with it fetching data from npm and PyPI but I don't want it to be able to access anything else (a common pattern these days, e.g. Claude's Code Interpreter does this.) masterj 7 months ago | parent | next [–] Cloudflare has Outbound Workers for exactly this use-case: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-for-platforms/w... If these aren't enabled for containers / sandboxes yet, I bet they will be soon kentonv 7 months ago | parent | prev | next [–] You may be interested in the Dynamic Worker Loader API, which lets you set up isolate-based sandboxes (instead of containers) and gives you extremely fine-grained, object-capability-based control over permissions. material_pack.core_question: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 废弃部分功能（HTTP/WebSocket 传输、低采用率特性）对普通技术人/独立开发者的实际影响是什么？是否有可替代方案或迁移成本？
material_pack.why_this_topic_matters: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK 是 AI 代码沙箱领域的重要产品，其功能废弃可能影响已采用该 SDK 的开发者工作流，同时反映 Cloudflare 在 Agent 基础设施上的战略方向。但当前影响范围尚不明确，需要更多数据支撑。
fact_summary: Cloudflare 宣布废弃 Sandbox SDK 中的 HTTP 和 WebSocket 传输模式，以及一些低采用率特性。
废弃功能将在 2026 年 7 月 9 日之后从未来版本中移除。
官方推荐迁移至新的 RPC 传输模式。
废弃原因：已被新能力取代或采用率低。
Sandbox SDK 用于在 Workers 生态中安全执行隔离代码，支持 Agent 工作流。

audience_fit.why_interested: 核心技术人关注 SDK 变更对现有项目的影响和迁移成本；入门读者可了解沙箱技术选型；商业读者关注 Cloudflare 产品策略。
audience_fit.reader_risk: 缺乏实际案例和社区反馈，容易写成纯官方公告解读，读者参与度低。

mass_interest_hook.why_non_technical_people_may_click: 标题可突出“你的代码可能突然不能用了”的危机感，但实际影响面窄，难以吸引泛兴趣读者。
mass_interest_hook.story_seed: 一个独立开发者依赖 Sandbox SDK 构建的 AI 工具，突然收到废弃通知，不得不紧急迁移。
mass_interest_hook.do_not_overhype: 不要夸大影响范围，目前缺乏证据表明大量用户受影响。

topic_tension.conflict_point: Cloudflare 推动 RPC 替代 HTTP/WebSocket，但开发者可能面临迁移成本和兼容性问题。
topic_tension.debate_question: RPC 传输是否真的优于 HTTP/WebSocket？迁移是否值得？
stakeholders: 替代方案提供商（如 Northflank）
topic_tension.why_people_would_comment: 讨论迁移经验、吐槽官方决策、对比替代方案。
topic_tension.traffic_risk: 话题过于专业，缺乏广泛争议点，容易变成小圈子讨论。

timeline: 2025-08-05: Sandbox SDK 重大更新（添加流式、代码解释器等）
2026-04: 发布 RPC 传输，废弃 WebSocket 传输
2026-07-09: 废弃功能从 SDK 中移除

As far as I can tell it's all or nothing right now: this.ctx.container.start({ enableInternet: false, }); I want to run untrusted code (from users or LLMs) in these containers, and I'd like to avoid someone malicious using my container to launch attacks against other sites from them. As such, I'd like to be able to allow-list just specific network points. Maybe I'm OK with the container talking to an API I provide but not to the world at wide. Or perhaps I'm OK with it fetching data from npm and PyPI but I don't want it to be able to access anything else (a common pattern these days, e.g. Claude's Code Interpreter does this.) masterj 7 months ago | parent | next [–] Cloudflare has Outbound Workers for exactly this use-case: https://developers.cloudflare.com/cloudflare-for-platforms/w...
